_README: PE / array per-action energies in pJ — THE MX-netlist slot. accelergy_eval.py injects these over Accelergy's dummy 1.0 pJ; CACTI handles memory, these are what your synthesized MX array provides. USED by this (scale-sim-v3) flow: mac.mac_random x (num_PEs x active cycles) -> array_mac, and spad.read/write x the MEASURED per-PE register-file accesses (DETAILED_ACCESS cols 19-24) -> pe_regfile. NOT counted unless you switch create_action_count.py to the gated convention: mac_gated, mult_gated, mult_reused. Replace the placeholder values below with your synthesized MX numbers.
